conservative.name: Waking Dream
conservative.requirements: 6 favour. You must brandish a raven's feather as you invoke the blessing

boon.description:
Effect: The line between reality and dream blurs around you. While this card is recharging, all actions performed by an ally within medium range of you gain the following effects:
Swap places with another character within medium range
Add to the results pool of this check
Adjust your stance by any amount
Flip 1 of your critical wound cards or recover 1 normal wound

sigmarsComet.description: While this card is recharging, each time an ally within medium range rolls at least one , add 1 recharge token to this card

reckless.name: Waking Nightmare
reckless.requirements: 6 favour. You must brandish a raven's feather as you invoke the blessing

bane.description:
Effect: The line between reality and nightmare blurs around you. While this card is recharging, all actions performed by an enemy within medium range of you gain the following effects:
Suffer 1 additional fatigue when performing manoeuvres until the end of your next turn
add to the results pool of this check
Adjust your stance to neutral
Suffer 1 critical wound

sigmarsComet.description: While this card is recharging, each time an enemy within medium range rolls at least one , add 1 recharge token to this card
